<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Client\Credentials; use RuntimeException; use function func_get_args; use function is_array; class Container extends AbstractCredentials { protected array $types = [ Basic::class, SignatureSecret::class, Keypair::class, Gnp::class ]; /** * @var array */ protected array $credentials; public function __construct($credentials) { if (!is_array($credentials)) { $credentials = func_get_args(); } foreach ($credentials as $credential) { $this->addCredential($credential); } } protected function addCredential(CredentialsInterface $credential): void { $type = $this->getType($credential); if (isset($this->credentials[$type])) { throw new RuntimeException('can not use more than one of a single credential type'); } $this->credentials[$type] = $credential; } protected function getType(CredentialsInterface $credential): ?string { foreach ($this->types as $type) { if ($credential instanceof $type) { return $type; } } return null; } public function get($type) { if (!isset($this->credentials[$type])) { throw new RuntimeException('credential not set'); } return $this->credentials[$type]; } public function has($type): bool { return isset($this->credentials[$type]); } public function generateJwt($claims) { return $this->credentials[Keypair::class]->generateJwt($claims); } }
